nodes.context: Italian criminal organization operating in Sicily and beyond.
French criminal gang headed by Albert Bergamelli.
Neapolitan criminal organization headed by Raffaele Cutolo.
Faction of the Sicilian Mafia headed by Luciano Leggio.

edges.evidence_quote: The gang made billions of lire from these rackets, and also participated in several robberies and kidnappings, with the complicity of the Banda dei Marsigliesi, headed by Albert Bergamelli.
edges.context: Turatello's gang cooperated with the Banda dei Marsigliesi in robberies and kidnappings.

edges.evidence_quote: He was a close ally of the Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO), headed by Raffaele Cutolo.
edges.context: Turatello was a close ally of the NCO.

edges.evidence_quote: He was also a trusted friend of Luciano Leggio, the head of the Corleonesi faction of the Sicilian Mafia.
edges.context: Turatello was a trusted friend of the Corleonesi leader.

edges.evidence_quote: Turatello has also been linked to many murky incidents of the history of Italy in the 1970s, including the abduction and murder of former Italian prime minister, Aldo Moro, and some criminal acts carried out by the Banda della Magliana of Rome.
edges.context: Turatello was linked to criminal acts by the Banda della Magliana.
